messages.text: Total Positive: 00:00Total Negative: 00:00Net: 00:00Rules:Full day Timing: January to March is 8:18 and April to December is 8:40.Half Timing: January to March is 4:09 and April to December is 4:20.Min Working hrs (Full day): January to March is 6:18 and April to December is 6:40.Min Working hrs (Half day): January to March is 2:00 and April to December is 2:00.Must be completed between 9:00–13:00 or 13:30–17:00.If an employee joins after 11:00, it is considered a Half Day.If an employee leaves before 3:18 (Jan–Mar) or 3:40 (Apr–Dec), it is considered a Half Day.Employees must complete minimum working hours for a Full Day (6:18 for Jan–Mar; 6:40 for Apr–Dec) between 9:00 to 5:18 (Jan–Mar) or 5:40 (Apr–Dec). Otherwise, it is a Half Day.Relaxation Period: Between 13:00 – 13:30. If an employee is out during this time, there is no deduction in working hours.Example: If lunch is from 12:50 to 13:40, only 20 minutes should be deducted.
